use_cases: Create engaging hover effects on headings or call-to-action text
Add dynamic text animations to marketing landing pages
Enhance button labels with scrambled reveal interactions
Build interactive portfolio or creative website text elements
Implement glitch-style text transitions in loading states
ai_summary: A lightweight text scrambling effect component that reveals characters progressively on hover using random character substitution. The animation cycles through a set of random characters (uppercase letters, numbers, symbols) before settling on the final text, creating a glitch-like reveal effect. Built with monospace typography and tracking for a tech-forward aesthetic, suitable for interactive UI elements requiring dynamic text transitions.
